name: FctsCMDriverHitList

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tempdb..@{pipeline().parameters.DriverTable};WITH cte_dedupe AS (SELECT CMCM_ID,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CMCM_ID ORDER BY (SELECT 1)) as rn FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.RND1_TMP_FctsCMDriverHitList) SELECT CMCM_ID INTO tempdb..@{pipeline().parameters.DriverTable} FROM cte_dedupe WHERE rn=1
